parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ad_stats WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE) as stats_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM balance_history WHERE collected_at >= CURRENT_DATE) as balance_checks_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bid_history WHERE changed_at >= CURRENT_DATE) as bid_changes_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teasers WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE) as new_teasers_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM anomalies WHERE detected_at >= CURRENT_DATE) as anomalies_today,
  (SELECT balance FROM balance_history ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1) as last_known_balance,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teasers WHERE status = 'uploaded' AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days') as active_teasers_week;

parameters.text:
=📅 WEEKLY OPTIMIZATION LAUNCHED
